|desc={{p|Sceptile}} is the first Pokémon Brendan is known to have. It was first seen as a Treecko in Brendan's house at [[Littleroot Town]]. Treecko was briefly seen battling a {{tc|Youngster}}'s {{p|Zigzagoon}}. Later, it was revealed to have evolved into a {{p|Grovyle}} and then a Sceptile. Sceptile then had the ability to Mega Evolve into a Mega Sceptile. It was last seen battling {{Steven}}'s {{TP|Steven|Mega Metagross|Metagross}}.

Sceptile's only known move is {{m|Pound}}.}}
